examples: I've told this story umpteen times.
He was interrupted by applause umpteen times.
There isn't time for umpteen dozen interviews to make sure he is the one or she is perfection.
Wrought iron, teak and wicker look-alikes will last through umpteen cold snaps, deluges and blizzards.
Over the years I have attended umpteen debates on the abolition of capital punishment.
